languages.text: "Давайте взглянем правде в глаза, {name}". {n}Себериан вытягивает перед собой руку, сжимает и разжимает механический кулак.{/n} "Я не так ловок, как был во времена своей юности, и даже тогда это не уберегало меня от тяжелых ран. Оглянитесь — мы на территории врага, что плетет против нас злые козни. Считать себя неуязвимым для его коварства — значит признаться в своей глупости. А я вовсе не глуп, {name}. Как, думаю, и вы".

"Let us face the truth, {name}." {n}Seberian extends a hand and clenches and then unclenches his metal fist.{/n} "I'm no longer as agile as I was in the days of my youth — not that I avoided grievous wounds even then. Look around you: we are in enemy territory, and the enemy is laying wicked schemes against us. To believe ourselves invulnerable to their cunning would be an admission of our own foolishness. But I am no fool, {name}. And I do not think you are either."
languages.original_text: "Давайте взглянем правде в глаза, {name}". {n}Себериан вытягивает перед собой руку, сжимает и разжимает механический кулак.{/n} "Я не так ловок, как был во времена своей юности, и даже тогда это не уберегало меня от тяжелых ран. Оглянитесь — мы на территории врага, что плетет против нас злые козни. Считать себя неуязвимым для его коварства — значит признаться в своей глупости. А я вовсе не глуп, {name}. Как, думаю, и вы".

traits.locale_text: "Let us face the truth, {name}." {n}Seberian puts out a hand and clenches his metal fist, then unclenches it.{/n} "I am no longer as agile as I was in the days of my youth — not that I avoided grievous wounds even then. Look around you: we are in enemy territory, and the enemy is crafting wicked schemes against us. To believe ourselves invulnerable to his cunning would be an admission of our own foolishness. But I am no fool, {name}. And I do not think you are either."

But I am no fool, {name}. And I do not think you are either."

But I am no fool, {name}. And I do not think you are either."

languages.text: "Sehen wir der Wahrheit ins Auge, {name}." {n}Seberian streckt seine Hand aus und ballt mehrmals seine metallene Faust.{/n} "Ich bin nicht mehr so beweglich wie in den Tagen meiner Jugend ... wobei ich auch damals nicht vor schweren Wunden zurückschreckte. Seht Euch um: Wir befinden uns auf feindlichem Terrain und der Feind plant heimtückische Anschläge auf uns. Zu glauben, seine Arglist kann uns nichts anhaben, wäre ein Beweis unseres eigenen Unverstandes. Ich bin aber kein Narr, {name}. Und ich glaube, das gilt auch für Euch."
languages.original_text: "Let us face the truth, {name}." {n}Seberian extends a hand and clenches and then unclenches his metal fist.{/n} "I'm no longer as agile as I was in the days of my youth — not that I avoided grievous wounds even then. Look around you: we are in enemy territory, and the enemy is laying wicked schemes against us. To believe ourselves invulnerable to their cunning would be an admission of our own foolishness. But I am no fool, {name}. And I do not think you are either."

traits.locale_text: "Sehen wir der Wahrheit ins Auge, {name}." {n}Seberian streckt seine Hand aus und ballt mehrmals seine metallene Faust.{/n} "Ich bin nicht mehr so beweglich wie in den Tagen meiner Jugend ... wobei ich auch damals nicht vor schweren Wunden zurückschreckte. Seht Euch um: Wir befinden uns auf feindlichem Terrain und der Feind plant heimtückische Anschläge auf uns. Zu glauben, seine Arglist kann uns nichts anhaben, wäre ein Beweis unseres eigenen Unverstandes. Ich bin aber kein Narr, {name}. Und ich glaube, das gilt auch für Euch."

languages.text: « Il faut regarder la vérité en face, {name}. » {n}Seberian tend une main vers vous, serrant et desserrant son poing de métal.{/n} « Je ne suis plus aussi agile que dans ma jeunesse, et je courais déjà au-devant du danger à l'époque. Regardez autour de vous : nous sommes en plein territoire hostile, et notre adversaire complote contre nous. Il faudrait être bien bête pour se croire invulnérable à ses manigances. Mais je ne suis pas un imbécile, {name}. Et vous non plus, je pense. »
languages.original_text: "Let us face the truth, {name}." {n}Seberian extends a hand and clenches and then unclenches his metal fist.{/n} "I'm no longer as agile as I was in the days of my youth — not that I avoided grievous wounds even then. Look around you: we are in enemy territory, and the enemy is laying wicked schemes against us. To believe ourselves invulnerable to their cunning would be an admission of our own foolishness. But I am no fool, {name}. And I do not think you are either."

traits.locale_text: « Il faut regarder la vérité en face, {name}. » {n}Seberian tend une main vers vous, serrant et desserrant son poing de métal.{/n} « Je ne suis plus aussi agile que dans ma jeunesse, et je courais déjà au-devant du danger à l'époque. Regardez autour de vous : nous sommes en plein territoire hostile, et notre adversaire complote contre nous. Il faudrait être bien bête pour se croire invulnérable à ses manigances. Mais je ne suis pas un imbécile, {name}. Et vous non plus, je pense. »

languages.text: «Hagamos frente a los hechos, {name}». {n}Seberian extiende una mano y abre y cierra el puño de metal.{/n} «Ya no soy tan ágil como era en mi juventud, aunque ni siquiera entonces evitaba recibir heridas terribles. Mire a su alrededor: estamos en territorio enemigo y nuestros oponentes urden planes maquiavélicos contra nosotros. Creer que somos invulnerables a su astucia sería admitir nuestra propia necedad. Pero yo no soy ningún necio, {name}, ni tampoco creo que usted lo sea».
languages.original_text: "Let us face the truth, {name}." {n}Seberian extends a hand and clenches and then unclenches his metal fist.{/n} "I'm no longer as agile as I was in the days of my youth — not that I avoided grievous wounds even then. Look around you: we are in enemy territory, and the enemy is laying wicked schemes against us. To believe ourselves invulnerable to their cunning would be an admission of our own foolishness. But I am no fool, {name}. And I do not think you are either."

traits.locale_text: «Hagamos frente a los hechos, {name}». {n}Seberian extiende una mano y abre y cierra el puño de metal.{/n} «Ya no soy tan ágil como era en mi juventud, aunque ni siquiera entonces evitaba recibir heridas terribles. Mire a su alrededor: estamos en territorio enemigo y nuestros oponentes urden planes maquiavélicos contra nosotros. Creer que somos invulnerables a su astucia sería admitir nuestra propia necedad. Pero yo no soy ningún necio, {name}, ni tampoco creo que usted lo sea».

languages.text: "Gerçekle yüzleşelim {name}." {n}Seberian, elini uzatıp metal yumruğunu sıkıyor ve ardından gevşetiyor.{/n} "Artık gençliğimde olduğu kadar çevik değilim. O zamanlar bile ağır yaralardan kaçınamıyordum. Etrafına bak: Düşman topraklarındayız ve düşman bize karşı hain planlar kuruyor. Onların kurnazlığına kanmayacağımızı sanmak, aptallığımızı kabul etmek olur. Ancak ben aptal değilim {name}. Senin de aptal olduğunu sanmıyorum."
languages.original_text: "Let us face the truth, {name}." {n}Seberian extends a hand and clenches and then unclenches his metal fist.{/n} "I'm no longer as agile as I was in the days of my youth — not that I avoided grievous wounds even then. Look around you: we are in enemy territory, and the enemy is laying wicked schemes against us. To believe ourselves invulnerable to their cunning would be an admission of our own foolishness. But I am no fool, {name}. And I do not think you are either."

O zamanlar bile ağır yaralardan kaçınamıyordum. Etrafına bak: Düşman topraklarındayız ve düşman bize karşı hain planlar kuruyor. Onların kurnazlığına kanmayacağımızı sanmak, aptallığımızı kabul etmek olur. Ancak ben aptal değilim {name}. Senin de aptal olduğunu sanmıyorum."

languages.text: “面对现实吧，{name}。”{n}塞贝里安伸出一只手，那只金属拳头先是攥紧，随后又缓缓松开。{/n}“我已经不如年轻时那般敏捷了——何况就算在当年，我也没少受重伤。看看你周围：我们身处敌境，而敌人正对我们布下恶毒的圈套。若觉得自己不会中他们的奸计，那反倒暴露了自己的愚蠢。但我可不是蠢人，{name}。我想你也不是。”
languages.original_text: "Let us face the truth, {name}." {n}Seberian extends a hand and clenches and then unclenches his metal fist.{/n} "I'm no longer as agile as I was in the days of my youth — not that I avoided grievous wounds even then. Look around you: we are in enemy territory, and the enemy is laying wicked schemes against us. To believe ourselves invulnerable to their cunning would be an admission of our own foolishness. But I am no fool, {name}. And I do not think you are either."

traits.locale_text: “面对现实吧，{name}。”{n}塞贝里安伸出一只手，那只金属拳头先是攥紧，随后又缓缓松开。{/n}“我已经不如年轻时那般敏捷了——何况就算在当年，我也没少受重伤。看看你周围：我们身处敌境，而敌人正对我们布下恶毒的圈套。若觉得自己不会中他们的奸计，那反倒暴露了自己的愚蠢。但我可不是蠢人，{name}。我想你也不是。”

languages.text: 「真実を直視しよう、{name}。」{n}シベリアは手を差し伸べ、金属の拳を握りしめ、緩める。{/n}「私はかつての若き日のように機敏ではありません。とはいえ、その頃も重傷を負うことはなかった。周囲を見渡せば、敵の地に足を踏み入れた我々は、敵の悪辣な企みに晒されている。敵の狡猾さに我々は無敵だと信じれば、それは我々の愚かさの告白である。しかし、私は愚か者ではない、{name}。そして、あなたも愚か者ではないと私は思う。」
languages.original_text: "Let us face the truth, {name}." {n}Seberian extends a hand and clenches and then unclenches his metal fist.{/n} "I'm no longer as agile as I was in the days of my youth — not that I avoided grievous wounds even then. Look around you: we are in enemy territory, and the enemy is laying wicked schemes against us. To believe ourselves invulnerable to their cunning would be an admission of our own foolishness. But I am no fool, {name}. And I do not think you are either."

traits.locale_text: 「真実を直視しよう、{name}。」{n}シベリアは手を差し伸べ、金属の拳を握りしめ、緩める。{/n}「私はかつての若き日のように機敏ではありません。とはいえ、その頃も重傷を負うことはなかった。周囲を見渡せば、敵の地に足を踏み入れた我々は、敵の悪辣な企みに晒されている。敵の狡猾さに我々は無敵だと信じれば、それは我々の愚かさの告白である。しかし、私は愚か者ではない、{name}。そして、あなたも愚か者ではないと私は思う。」
